title: In the Studio with Pinkfresh
excerpt: Pinkfresh Studio sent over a package that came in a gorgeous hot pink envelope full of their latest products. It made me want to create immediately, so I made some 4x6 cards that can be easily slipped into Project Life…
body:
Pinkfresh Studio sent over a package that came in a gorgeous hot pink envelope full of their latest products. It made me want to create immediately, so I made some 4x6 cards that can be easily slipped into Project Life page protectors or onto layouts at a later time. Love these retro Instaframes both for putting photos inside and outside.

Pinkfresh Studio is offering 20% off through the end of April using the code: AMY20.
